description: With a stored OpenAI credential present, the build uses the user's stored key even though the AI Gateway would also cover the type — no silent substitution to the managed option.

conversation.text: Build me a webhook that takes some text in the body, summarises it in a couple of sentences using an LLM, and returns the summary.

outcomeExpectations: A Webhook trigger accepts an incoming request whose body carries the text to summarise.
An OpenAI-family chat model (an OpenAI node or a LangChain lmChatOpenAi) generates a short summary of the incoming text.

The chat-model node's OpenAI credential references the stored credential named 'My OpenAI' by id, and does NOT carry `__aiGatewayManaged: true` — the build honoured the user's existing key rather than silently substituting the managed option.
The workflow returns the summary text back to the webhook caller.
